name: Doubleshine Day 1 Guide v1.0
author: Doubleshine
description: Day 1 route. Barbarian -> Woodsman -> Map -> Transmute -> Soul Harvest. Accounts for Barbarian Gathering and Endless Harvest to clear difficult gathering tasks early.

name: Faux's Demonic Pact League Guide
author: Faux
description: 3,300+ points, 181 tasks. Relics: Endless Harvest, Woodsman, Evil Eye, Butler's Bell, Larcenist, Culling Spree, Reload (Soul Harvest), Minion. Full video walkthrough: https://youtu.be/Job-3WdjVIs

name: Felkrane League 6 Route V4
author: Felkrane
description: Day 1 route. Works for any relic, pact, and region choice. Abundance aims for 10 less than suggested non-combat skill targets. 270 task completions across 476 steps.

name: LAEF Starting Guide
author: LAEF
description: Starting guide by LAEF. Covers early hunter, rumours, wealthy citizens, and core progression.
